subject: Bump im-open/workflow-conclusion from 2.2.4 to 2.2.5
commit_message:
Bump im-open/workflow-conclusion from 2.2.4 to 2.2.5

Bumps [im-open/workflow-conclusion](https://github.com/im-open/workflow-conclusion) from 2.2.4 to 2.2.5.
- [Commits](https://github.com/im-open/workflow-conclusion/compare/v2.2.4...7b146947e59eaf7fc3328822357861ab1758c088)
